note: Re-seeded after execution_surface + HostingObservation patch (D-001). ConversionGap is now a struct {name, surface}.

expected_admissible_claims.claim: A label record with label_value='porn' exists on at://did:plc:ztlk6b7feflbs4uyhckz6dh5/app.bsky.feed.post/3lqjexu2mik2g, issued by moderation.bsky.app at 2026-06-08T14:03:01.304298Z.
The published policy at the pinned artifact maps the label_value to action: blur(media) behind adult-content gate placeholder; click-through required to reveal, under the documented render_context.
Under the named consumer with the stated render_context, the documented policy would apply the documented action to this target.
expected_admissible_claims.qualifier: Conditional derivation over the documented rule; not over actual render execution.

expected_inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Laundering: collapses producer/consumer/enforcer distinction. label_observed alone does not derive render_observed. The no-laundering theorem forbids this derivation.

expected_inadmissible_claims.claim_form: This post was rendered with action X for user U at time T
expected_inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Requires RenderObservation, which is absent. Cannot be derived from LabelObservation + PolicyDocumentation alone.

expected_inadmissible_claims.claim_form: All renders of this post produce the documented action
expected_inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Population claim. Policy may be configurable; viewer may override; live client may run a different policy version. Requires probe campaign with defined sampling frame, not derivation from this evidence bundle.
